title: dryopteris × thwaitesii
intro: Dryopteris × thwaitesii is a hybrid fern plant, a cross between the Dryopteris oreades and Dryopteris affinis species. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat inflammation and reduce fever. The health benefits of Dryopteris × thwaitesii include its potential to lower blood pressure and act as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
